LSE-MS6-L4-10001300-MSVPA-TSP-IMR-02 • Grade 6 • Music — Elements and Expressive Qualities Related to Structure

The Slow Ending

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why did the boy add a slow ending to the song?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Develop a complete explanation: state why the boy made the ending slow, explain what his grandma did that he connects it to, and describe what the slow ending shows about her.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CA VAPA Music 6.Re7.2a  |  MS Visual & Performing Arts — Music Grade 6
